creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm not sure moving TMPDIR to WRKDIR is a good idea. I'd generally be wary of putting /tmp on tmpfs in low-memory environments.
I like the idea of a warning from www/chromium more. Ideally, we would have something like https://gitweb.gentoo.org/repo/gentoo.git/tree/eclass/check-reqs.eclass
